description: Privileged Thunderbird calendar access for Local Calendar CalDAV Mirror.

functions.name: ping
functions.description: Return a minimal value to confirm the experiment API is loaded.

functions.name: diagnostics
functions.description: Return calendar access diagnostics for troubleshooting.

functions.name: exportCalendar
functions.description: Export events from a Thunderbird calendar as sanitized iCalendar payloads.

functions.name: savePassword
functions.description: Save a password to Thunderbird's password manager.

functions.name: loadPassword
functions.description: Load a password from Thunderbird's password manager.

functions.name: hasPassword
functions.description: Check if a password exists in Thunderbird's password manager.

functions.name: clearPassword
functions.description: Remove a password from Thunderbird's password manager.
